name: nxsflow
description: NexusFlow Claude Code plugins — brand guidelines and continuous memory.

plugins.name: claude-memory
plugins.description: Build up a continuous learning mechanism for the Claude Code coding assistant with short-term and long-term memory.

plugins.name: nxsflow-brand
plugins.description: NexusFlow brand guideline skill — colors, typography, tone, logo rules.

plugins.name: nxf-workflow
plugins.description: NexusFlow development-loop skills — plan the next task, review the PR, mitigate findings, and report to the PM. Stack-agnostic review; uses nexus-flow (nxf) as the issue tracker.
